sn2.7:1.2: As he was standing to one side, Pañcālacaṇḍa the deva’s son recited this verse in the Blessed One’s presence:
sn2.7:2.1: “Truly in a confining place, he found an opening—
sn2.7:2.3: the awakened one who awakened to jhāna,
sn2.7:2.4: the chief bull, withdrawn, the sage.”
sn2.7:3.1: The Buddha: “Even in a confining place they find it,
sn2.7:3.3: “the Dhamma for the attainment of unbinding.
